csv_upload.details: Multi/single church CSV upload with hash dedup, accept filter, extension check

progressive_matching.details: 7 passes (0,3,6,12,35,60 days + text), min score 10 for text pass, 30-day sanity gate

transfers_to_conference.details: Multi-item grouping by conference_id via bank_reconciliation_items, ABS(?) sign fix, ±45 day window

duplicate_filter.details: 40-day window, same amount + first 80 chars of bank_desc

custom_patterns.details: Church-specific keyword pairs, +3 score in text pass, CRUD UI on reconciliation.php

document_check.details: 14-point audit checklist (incl. bank_in_ots_ok), sortable table, localStorage filters, embedded modal in reconciliation.php

transaction_search.details: Server-side search with OTS→Bank reverse lookup, aliased count subquery fix

session_management.details: 20-min Revizor session, AJAX keepalive, popup login with polling, session_write_close() for long ops

auto_match_modal.details: Progressive/custom/search modes, progress file, timer, church scope, TDZ fix, session lock fix

combined_details_modal.details: Parallel bank/OTS view, prev/next navigation, existing match display, aggregation search

reconciliation_navbar.details: Two-row layout (title row 1, filter row 2), hamburger menu for actions, responsive
